steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank fills: 'As the ______ the Danube River and the Black Sea, the deltaic system is a dynamic habitat...' The passage describes a place where the river mixes with the sea — two distinct bodies of water meeting. The blank needs a word or phrase meaning a meeting point or boundary between two systems.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'accordance between': means agreement or harmony. The deltaic system is not an agreement between two bodies of water. ✗
  • Choice B — 'predecessor of': means something that came before. The deltaic system did not precede the Danube River and the Black Sea, and 'predecessor of' cannot take two objects linked by 'and.' ✗
  • Choice C — 'interface between': means a boundary or zone where two systems meet and interact. This fits perfectly: the deltaic system is where the Danube and the Black Sea meet and exchange materials. ✓
  • Choice D — 'confines of': means the boundaries or limits of a single enclosed space, not a meeting point between two things. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
